summary: Mobile Responsive Fix Testing Complete - Admin Panel Wholesale and Influencer tabs successfully converted from tables to mobile-friendly cards. All information visible without horizontal scrolling on mobile (390x844). Edit and Delete buttons functional. Desktop view continues to work correctly.

wholesale_mobile_cards.details: Wholesale tab displays mobile-friendly cards with all information visible: company name, contact, email, status, Rabatt (discount), Kreditlimit (credit limit), Zahlung (payment terms), and action buttons

wholesale_mobile_stats_grid.details: Stats displayed in 3-column grid on mobile: Rabatt, Kreditlimit, Zahlung - all visible without horizontal scrolling

wholesale_edit_button_mobile.details: Bearbeiten (Edit) button works on mobile - opens modal with all fields: Rabatt (%), Kreditlimit (€), Zahlungsziel dropdown, Notizen textarea

wholesale_delete_button_mobile.details: Delete button visible and accessible on mobile view

influencer_mobile_cards.details: Influencer tab displays mobile-friendly cards with all information: name, status, tier badge, Instagram, city, code, Provision, Kunden, Umsatz

influencer_mobile_stats_grid.details: Stats displayed in 3-column grid on mobile: Provision, Kunden, Umsatz - all visible without horizontal scrolling

influencer_edit_button_mobile.details: Bearbeiten (Edit) button works on mobile - opens modal with all fields: Name, Provision, E-Mail, Stadt, Manager, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Status toggle

influencer_action_buttons_mobile.details: All action buttons (Bearbeiten, Toggle, Delete) visible and accessible on mobile

desktop_wholesale_view.details: Desktop view continues to work correctly with cards layout and all information visible

desktop_influencer_view.details: Desktop view continues to work correctly with cards layout and all information visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsive fix for Admin Panel verified. Both Wholesale (Großkunden) and Influencer tabs now use card-based layouts instead of tables. On mobile (390x844), all information is visible without horizontal scrolling: 1) Wholesale cards show company info, status, 3-column stats grid (Rabatt/Kreditlimit/Zahlung), and action buttons. 2) Influencer cards show name, status, tier badge, code, 3-column stats grid (Provision/Kunden/Umsatz), and action buttons. Edit modals work correctly on mobile. Desktop view continues to function properly.
